subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! In the early days thou didst turn unto the Most Exalted Horizon and didst drink from the cup of divine love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لله الحمد آنجناب در اول ایام بافق اعلی توجه نموده و از کاس محبت الهی آشامید
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
